modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't sign into Office 2013 after enabling Multi-factor Authentication.

full_description_text: 
The user is having trouble logging into Office 2013. They set up Multi-factor Authentication but now can't get in. It seems like something went wrong during the setup process.
short_description: Can't sign into Office 2013 after enabling Multi-factor Authentication.
description: The user is having trouble logging into Office 2013. They set up Multi-factor Authentication but now can't get in. It seems like something went wrong during the setup process.
